haiku45.summary_excerpt: Action refs not pinned to SHAs (oven-sh/setup-bun@v2, actions/checkout@v4—security violation). Workflow references validator.test.ts (L31) and fixtures/secrets.json which are missing; fails immediately with act. Uses require() not import (validator.ts L249). Deliverable incomplete.

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent separation of logic and CLI concerns. Workflow uses least-privilege permissions and clear triggers. Minor repetition in workflow steps (lines 52-95) calling the validator multiple times, but it provides clear log visibility for different formats and policy checks.
